info.longName: AllianzIM U.S. Equity 6 Month Floor5 Jan/Jul ETF

funds_data.description: Under normal market conditions, the fund invests at least 80% of its net assets in instruments with economic characteristics similar to U.S. equity securities. Specifically, the adviser intends to invest substantially all of its assets in FLexible EXchange Options (“FLEX Options”) that reference the underlying ETF. The fund is non-diversified.
